patterns.command_pattern: Commands are enum variants in Command enum with clap attributes, matched in main.rs to call module functions
patterns.file_ops_pattern: Use std::fs for file operations, walkdir crate for recursive directory traversal
patterns.test_pattern: Use tempfile crate for temporary directories, tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests at bottom of files
patterns.config_pattern: Load config with bop_core::load_config(), config has log_retention_days field

existing_implementations.description: Found existing card manipulation commands (retry, kill, approve) in cards.rs, card lookup utilities in paths.rs
